meaning: prep.在...之上,依附于,临近,靠近,向,在...时候,关于,涉及adv.在上,向前,行动中,作用中
examples: Two men riding on motorcycles opened fire on him.
She went on and on about her trip.
From now on you can work on your own.
On the asset side, one of the portfolios is the funded reserve for grants.
This creates a bottom for the market by putting a price on the most problematic paper.
